narrative:
Meigs Township has 2,344 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.2 percentage points.
